calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID FORAN FOR PLAINTIFF PAO THE PROPERTY, INC. WITH CHARLES GAETANI, PRESIDENT AND JIM HIGGINS, PROPERTY MANAGER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY MEREDITH WALWORTH WITH JONATHAN DEGOOYER FOR DEFENDANT PRESTON DEAN SHUMAN WHO IS ALSO PRESENT

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE AS FOLLOWS:
TRIAL DATE IS ORDERED VACATED. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $2,400.00 THRU HIS ATTORNEY'S OFFICE BY 5PM, FEB-15-2006. DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES LOCATED AT 37 STATES STREET, , SAN FRANCISCO, CA BY 5PM, MARCH 4, 2006. PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE FEB-06-2006 RENT. IF PREMISES IS TIMELY VACATED,DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE CREDIT OF $800.00 FROM SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE REMAINING BALANCE OF $4,800.00 IN BACK RENT IS DUE ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 31, 2007. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. DISMISSAL OF ACTION WILL BE FILED BY JAN-31-2007 UPON FULL COMPLIANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT.
PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND CONCUR WITH THE STIPULATION STATED FOR THE RECORD.

SEE REPORTER'S NOTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF THE TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM THOMAS DROHAN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)
